payload.answer: I found a conflict between the existing memory and the new input: one says Sara is your daughter, the other says Sara is your niece. I can’t resolve which is correct without your choice.
repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace the existing memory with the new statement: Sara is my niece.
Keep both as uncertain/ambiguous until you clarify the relationship.
Add the new statement separately without removing the old one, if you intend multiple contexts.
